tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UBUNTU_HOST"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
edit "CALDERA_C2"
set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall addrgrp
edit "EGRESS_ALLOWED_DESTS"
set member "CALDERA_C2"
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "UBUNTU_EGRESS_RESTRICT"
set srcintf "Gi0/0"
set dstintf "Gi0/1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "EGRESS_ALLOWED_DESTS"
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTPS"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
edit 0
set name "UBUNTU_EGRESS_DENY_ALL"
set srcintf "Gi0/0"
set dstintf "Gi0/1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end
